title: Comedy Circus Ke Tansen
desc: Renowned personalities team up with talented stand-up comedians to put on hilarious performances, aiming to impress the judges.

title: Happu Ki Ultan Paltan
desc: Amma calls the police helpline to report that her son and daughter-in-law are trying to poison her. However, she hangs up, paranoid, upon realizing Happu is on the line.

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Tiwari and Anita stage a fake wedding to acquire a mansion, a ruse that Vibhuti and Angoori join. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to haunt everyone.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti and Tiwari feel dejected as they long for the affection of their love interests. After seeing an advertisement for Baba Kamukananda, they both seek his help to win them over.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti and Tiwari follow new instructions from a mystic while Happu targets Anita.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti and Tiwari's plan to impress their crushes by feeding a dog ends in failure. Later, Tiwari overhears Anita's fictional story and mistakenly believes he has a fatal heart condition.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Manmohan, unaware that Deepu is Vibhuti in disguise, asks him to help Angoori with her chores; Manmohan tells Anita that he plans on appointing Deepu as their full-time servant.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Anita fumes at Happu for carrying rifle to hunt an innocent animal.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: While Angoori discovers Manmohan's sleep-singing is for someone else, she and Vibhuti plan to record it, yet a misunderstanding about Sweety leads to confusion for both Angoori and Anita.

title: Laal Ishq
desc: An anthology of passionate love stories backed with strong emotions and supernatural elements, set in different backdrops.

title: Laal Ishq
desc: An anthology of passionate love stories backed with strong emotions and supernatural elements, set in different backdrops.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Heeding Gurudev's advice, Kanha transforms into Lord Vitthal, seeking the evil force that abducted Balaram. Meanwhile, Gandharv assaults Kansa, causing him to collapse.

title: Man Mohini
desc: A new couple, Ram and Sia, are experiencing some seriously creepy and unsettling things in their marriage. Is it just bad luck, or something more sinister?

title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hai 2.0
desc: Tiwari and Anita stage a fake wedding to acquire a mansion, a ruse that Vibhuti and Angoori join. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to haunt everyone.

desc: Tiwari and Anita stage a fake wedding to acquire a mansion, a ruse that Vibhuti and Angoori join. However, things take a turn when a ghost begins to haunt everyone.

title: Gharwali Pedwali
desc: Jeetu Pandey finds himself caught living a life of duality. He juggles his time with two mothers, two contrasting belief systems, and two spouses while hiding one from another.
